content: We can embed a 2025-configurable ICM curiosity mechanism into the upper decomposition layer of a hierarchical multi-agent task planner, where the intrinsic reward of ICM drives the upper layer agent to explore novel task decomposition strategies instead of relying on rigid, pre-trained decomposition templates. This creates a self-evolving hierarchical planning system where low-level agents execute decomposed sub-tasks stably while the high-level planner continuously improves its decomposition ability through intrinsic curiosity-driven exploration.
